Lessons > 24. Dictionary Counting and P2 (Spotify)

NOTE

PLEASE DO NOT NAME A FILE IN YOUR P2 FOLDER email.py LIKE WE DO IN LECTURE. That’s why there’s that problem we have at the end! Name it something like test_email.py and you won’t have any issue. More details on CampusWire.

Agenda

  1. The counting algorithm for dictionaries.
  2. Get the project 2 files and dependencies installed on your computer.
  3. Practice using three of the modules that we have designed to help you with project 2 (located inside of the apis folder):
    • twilio
    • yelp
    • spotify

Today's Activities

For today, please do the following:

1. Review the Slides

  1. Using Dictionaries for Data Analysis (continued)
